name: Facebook Ads — Ad-level Insights
description: Daily ad-level performance insights from the Meta Marketing API (Facebook). The underlying connector also returns campaign- and adset-level rollups in the same call; those will be exposed via separate manifests in the future. The format_response node will read records.ads from the connector response and emit it to BigQuery as defined in table_naming.

required.name: fields
required.description: List of available_fields names to retrieve. If empty, all selectable fields for the ad level are returned.

optional.name: days_back
optional.description: Number of days back from today. Used when neither (date_start, date_stop) nor (since, until) are provided.

optional.name: date_start
optional.description: ISO date — inclusive lower bound of the report window. Use together with date_stop.

optional.name: date_stop
optional.description: ISO date — inclusive upper bound of the report window. Use together with date_start.

optional.name: since
optional.description: Alias of date_start (kept for compatibility with the Instagram connector pattern).

optional.name: until
optional.description: Alias of date_stop (kept for compatibility with the Instagram connector pattern).

available_fields.name: account_id
available_fields.description: Meta ad account id (without the 'act_' prefix).

available_fields.name: created_time
available_fields.description: Date the ad was created. Meta's Insights endpoint truncates to YYYY-MM-DD for this field (no time component); kept as DATE in BQ to match. If a future connector version returns full timestamps, promote this to TIMESTAMP and recreate the BQ table.

available_fields.name: date_start
available_fields.description: Lower bound of the daily increment. Always returned by the connector when time_increment is set.

available_fields.name: date_stop
available_fields.description: Upper bound of the daily increment. Always returned.

available_fields.name: impressions
available_fields.description: Cast from string to float by the connector.

available_fields.name: spend
available_fields.description: Spend in account currency. Cast from string to float by the connector.

available_fields.name: actions
available_fields.description: Array of {action_type, value} objects flattened by Meta.
